message:
feat(btrfs,core,mvcc): COW allocator trait, sharded MVCC store, expanded btrfs parsing

- Add CowAllocator trait with alloc_cow/defer_free/gc_free for
  copy-on-write block lifecycle management
- Introduce PhysicalBlockVersion and CowRewriteIntent for tracking
  logical-to-physical block mappings across transactions
- Add sharded.rs module for concurrent MVCC store partitioning
- Expand btrfs item parsing with compression fields and tree traversal
- Enrich ffs-core chunk mapping with tracing diagnostics and IO error context
- Improve CLI diagnostic output formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
